data_source.name: Star Citizen Wiki API + curated community sources
data_source.note: Ship/weapon catalog from the single-source API rebuild. Earnings Finder + Patch Hub data is community-curated and tracked separately.

key_changes_in_48: Damage Deflection Threshold system (armor meta overhaul)
4.8.1 (2026-06-03): Gatac Railen flyable (medium hybrid cargo hauler) + second Gatac industrial ship; new Defend missions; Alien Week event; 30+ fixes

data_quality.spot_check_validation: 3 ships + 3 weapons verified against live API — all values match exactly

notes: v2.0 — single-source ship/weapon rebuild (armor as damage multipliers; penetration as base_distance). Patch tracking refreshed to 4.8.2-LIVE on 2026-06-22 (manual update). Money/reputation/guide content verified current for 4.8.x — 4.8.1 and 4.8.2 added ships, defend missions and fixes but no new earning mechanics.
